qa_report.rework_reason: PR #108 REJECT — .bandit 전역 skip 보안 완화 수정

check.name: bandit_B105_B106_removed
check.result: PASS — No issues identified. .bandit 원복 + per-line nosec 5곳 확인

check.name: nosec_annotations
check.result: PASS — test_three_gate_pipeline.py line 193 (B105), 1009/2654/2729 (B106); tests/test_pm_split.py line 144 (B105) — 모두 사유 포함

check.name: full_pytest_suite
check.command: python -m pytest test_three_gate_pipeline.py tests/test_pm_split.py tests/test_codex_review.py test_three_gate_e2e.py -x -q
check.result: PASS — 142 passed, 1 warning, 11 subtests passed in 58.38s

check.name: mypy_clean
check.command: python -m mypy test_three_gate_pipeline.py tests/test_pm_split.py tests/test_codex_review.py test_three_gate_e2e.py --ignore-missing-imports
check.result: PASS — Success: no issues found in 4 source files

check.name: scope_boundary
check.result: PASS — 변경 파일 5개 모두 PM scope 내 (MT-1: test_three_gate_e2e.py, MT-2: test_three_gate_pipeline.py + tests/test_pm_split.py + .bandit, MT-3: tests/test_codex_review.py)
